case_title: LAUREN MUELLER VS. HOTEL EDWARD II, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUELLER, LAUREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOTEL EDWARD II, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EDWARD II INN AND SUITES $5,911.93 PRINCIPAL, $217.67 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,334.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
